name: Golden Path AI
description: AI-native infrastructure platform that trains proprietary latency prediction models, serves production LLM inference on NVIDIA GPUs, monitors model quality with guardrails, runs privacy controls, and optimizes TensorRT/Triton deployments for enterprise customers.
product_summary: Managed GPU inference with autoscaling, custom model optimization, governance, observability, Kubernetes deployment, Kafka/Spark streaming infrastructure, feature stores, and NVIDIA Triton/TensorRT acceleration for production AI workloads.

evidence.claim: Operates production LLM inference with autoscaling, latency monitoring, and model quality guardrails
evidence.quote_or_evidence: Platform runs production LLM inference workloads with autoscaling, p95 latency monitoring, model evaluation, observability dashboards, and guardrails for enterprise deployments.

evidence.claim: Uses NVIDIA A100 GPUs, CUDA, TensorRT, and Triton Inference Server for model serving
evidence.quote_or_evidence: The serving stack includes NVIDIA A100 GPUs, CUDA kernels, TensorRT optimization, Triton Inference Server, PyTorch, Kubernetes, and Docker for production model serving.

evidence.claim: 500+ enterprise customers use the product in production
evidence.quote_or_evidence: Serving 500+ enterprise customers with production inference traffic and real-time usage feedback loops.

evidence.claim: Proprietary telemetry data trains custom optimization models
evidence.quote_or_evidence: The platform trains proprietary latency and cost optimization models using anonymized request telemetry, feature stores, Kafka/Spark streaming infrastructure, and feedback data from production deployments.

evidence.claim: Governance and privacy controls are built into production deployments
evidence.quote_or_evidence: Enterprise deployments include privacy controls, audit logs, model governance, evaluation gates, data protection workflows, and controlled Kubernetes deployment policies.

evidence.claim: Raised Series A funding to expand GPU inference infrastructure
evidence.quote_or_evidence: Golden Path AI raised Series A funding to expand its NVIDIA GPU inference infrastructure for enterprise AI workloads.
